policy_issues.description: The title contains the phrase 'Best Quality', which is a prohibited superlative claim under Amazon policy.
policy_issues.suggestion: Remove 'Best Quality' and replace with factual descriptors like 'High-Quality' or 'Premium'.

policy_issues.description: Bullet point includes 'Limited Time Offer' and '50% Off', which are promotional pricing claims not allowed in standard listings.
policy_issues.suggestion: Remove promotional language. Use only factual product features and benefits.

policy_issues.description: The description states 'Cures headaches and improves vision', which are unsubstantiated medical claims unless the product is in an approved health category.
policy_issues.suggestion: Remove all medical claims. If applicable, ensure the product is registered and approved for health claims.

policy_issues.description: The title uses all capital letters for 'AMAZING PRODUCT', which violates Amazon's formatting guidelines.
policy_issues.suggestion: Use standard capitalization (e.g., 'Amazing Product') to improve readability.

action_items: Remove 'Best Quality' and replace with factual descriptors like 'High-Quality' or 'Premium'.
Remove promotional language. Use only factual product features and benefits.
Remove all medical claims. If applicable, ensure the product is registered and approved for health claims.
Use standard capitalization (e.g., 'Amazing Product') to improve readability.

top_alerts.content: Disappointed with the quality. Stopped working after 2 weeks.
